description: The reviewer states 669 primes, but the finding correctly states 172. π(1021) = 172, confirmed by the actual computation log (cayley_gpu1.log) which outputs exactly 172 data rows for primes 2 through 1021. The number 669 does not correspond to any known prime-counting value in this range (π(5000) ≈ 669). The finding's prime count is correct and needs no correction.
